prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: large yellow metal cube
  - obj_1: small red rubber sphere
  - obj_2: large yellow metal cylinder
  - obj_3: small cyan rubber cube
  - obj_4: large cyan metal cylinder
  - obj_5: large yellow metal cube
  - obj_6: large cyan rubber cylinder
  - obj_7: large purple rubber sphere
  - obj_8: small cyan metal cylinder
  - obj_9: small yellow metal sphere

Questions:
[qrr_0341] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0342] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0343] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0344] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0345] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0346] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0347] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0348] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0349] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0350] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0351] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0352] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0353] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0354] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0355] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0356] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0357] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_8 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0358] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0359] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0360] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
